creator: dhorn2000@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 244660
14-Alpha4 Patch to Base OpenSSL for legacy provider

Looks like the patch notes from https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=254853#c98 by Mark Millard solves the base issue with the OpenSSL 3 legacy provider in stable/14 base for my use case (py-cryptography/py-fido2/py-yubikey-manager.  No more needing to set the environment variable or modify `/etc/ssl/openssl.cnf`  to execute python.

This applies cleanly to stable/14 for me.

I uploaded an attachment for future reference.
